creator: glewis@FreeBSD.org
text:
The package builder for 12-CURRENT is also reporting errors, but the log doesn't appear to have been retained and the snippet it emails out also doesn't contain the error.

If you have a build log, please have a look for the compiler error and add that to the PR.  I'll see if there is a way I can get access to an 11.x machine as well.
